translations.en: I live out of town now.
translations.es: Ahora vivo fuera de la ciudad.
translations.fr: Je vis maintenant en dehors de la ville.
translations.vi: Giờ tôi sống ở ngoại ô.
translations.nl: Ik woon nu buiten de stad.
translations.hi: अब मैं शहर के बाहर रहता हूँ.
translations.id: Sekarang saya tinggal di luar kota.
translations.da: Jeg bor nu uden for byen.
translations.ja: 今は郊外に住んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense 1st person singular; intransitive 'to live/reside'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; indicates current time.
Locative adverb meaning 'outside'; used without complement, modifying the clause's location.

translations.en: The playground is unfortunately out of town.
translations.es: Lamentablemente, el parque infantil está fuera de la ciudad.
translations.fr: Malheureusement, l’aire de jeux est en dehors de la ville.
translations.it: Purtroppo il parco giochi è fuori città.
translations.zh-Hans: 遗憾的是，那个游乐场在城外。
translations.yue: 可惜，嗰個遊樂場喺城外。
translations.ru: К сожалению, детская площадка находится за городом.
translations.pt: Infelizmente, o parque infantil fica fora da cidade.
translations.he: למרבה הצער, מגרש המשחקים נמצא מחוץ לעיר.
translations.tr: Ne yazık ki oyun parkı şehir dışında.
translations.vi: Tiếc là sân chơi nằm ở ngoài thành phố.
translations.ar: للأسف، ساحة الألعاب تقع خارج المدينة.
translations.nl: Helaas ligt de speeltuin buiten de stad.
translations.uk: На жаль, дитячий майданчик знаходиться за містом.
translations.hu: Sajnos a játszótér a városon kívül van.
translations.hi: दुर्भाग्य से खेल का मैदान शहर के बाहर है.
translations.pl: Niestety, plac zabaw jest poza miastem.
translations.el: Δυστυχώς, η παιδική χαρά είναι εκτός πόλης.
translations.id: Sayangnya, taman bermain berada di luar kota.
translations.ro: Din păcate, locul de joacă se află în afara orașului.
translations.cs: Bohužel je dětské hřiště mimo město.
translations.da: Desværre ligger legepladsen uden for byen.
translations.ja: 残念ながら、その遊び場は郊外にあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of 'Spielplatz'.
Common noun, nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb, present tense 3rd person singular; denotes location ('to be situated').
Sentential adverb expressing speaker attitude; modifies the whole clause.
Locative adverb meaning 'outside'; used without genitive complement here.

translations.es: Hoy aparcamos muy a las afueras.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, on se gare loin, en périphérie.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我们把车停在很远的城外。
translations.yue: 我哋今日喺城外好遠嘅地方泊車。
translations.ru: Сегодня мы паркуемся далеко за городом.
translations.pt: Hoje vamos estacionar longe, nos arredores.
translations.he: היום אנחנו מחנים רחוק, בפרברי העיר.
translations.tr: Bugün arabayı uzakta, şehrin dışında park ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng ta đỗ xe xa, ở ngoại ô.
translations.ar: اليوم سنركن السيارة بعيدًا، في أطراف المدينة.
translations.nl: Vandaag parkeren we ver weg, aan de rand van de stad.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ми паркуємося далеко, на околиці.
translations.hu: Ma jó messze, a város szélén parkolunk.
translations.hi: आज हम काफी दूर, शहर के किनारे गाड़ी पार्क करेंगे.
translations.pl: Dziś parkujemy daleko, na obrzeżach miasta.
translations.nb: I dag parkerer vi langt unna, i utkanten av byen.
translations.id: Hari ini kita parkir jauh, di pinggiran kota.
translations.sv: I dag parkerar vi långt bort, i utkanten av stan.
translations.ro: Astăzi parcăm departe, la marginea orașului.
translations.cs: Dnes parkujeme daleko, na okraji města.
translations.da: I dag parkerer vi langt væk, i udkanten af byen.
translations.ja: 今日は街のはずれに車を停めます。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb placed clause-initially; topicalizes time.
Finite main verb, present tense 1st person plural; verb-second due to initial adverb.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject.
Degree/measure adverb intensifying the locative 'außerhalb' ('far outside').
Locative adverb; indicates place without a genitive complement.

translations.es: En las afueras está muy tranquilo.
translations.fr: C’est très calme en dehors de la ville.
translations.pt: Fora da cidade é bem tranquilo.
translations.vi: Ngoài thành phố rất yên tĩnh.
translations.nl: Buiten de stad is het heel rustig.
translations.hu: A városon kívül nagyon csend van.
translations.hi: शहर के बाहर बहुत शांति है.
translations.nb: Utenfor byen er det veldig rolig.
translations.sv: Utanför stan är det väldigt lugnt.
translations.ro: În afara orașului e foarte liniște.
translations.da: Uden for byen er der meget stille.
translations.ja: 街の外はとても静かです。

tokens.explanation: Personal/expletive pronoun, 3rd person singular neuter nominative; subject of a copular clause.
Copula auxiliary, present tense 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate.
Degree adverb intensifying the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective in positive degree; complements the copula.
Locative adverb modifying the clause; indicates the place where it is quiet.
